zh.lifeSummary: 當Sarah Cooke於1635年11月20日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼時，她的父親John Cooke28歲，母親Sarah Warren11632歲。她於1652年11月20日與Arthur Hathaway在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯度波利結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1712年2月26日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布里斯托達特姆斯享年76歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布里斯托達特姆斯阿乃特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sarah Cooke于1635年11月20日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼时，她的父亲John Cooke28岁，母亲Sarah Warren11632岁。她于1652年11月20日与Arthur Hathaway在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯度波利结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1712年2月26日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布里斯托達特姆斯享年76岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布里斯托達特姆斯阿乃特。

nameMeanings.name: Cooke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Cook  .

History: Francis Cooke (died 1663) and his eldest son John were passengers on the Mayflower in 1621; they were joined two years later by Francis's wife and other children. In the words of William Bradford, he lived long enough ‘to see his children's children have children’.

variants.name: Cook
meanings: English: occupational name for a cook, a seller of cooked meats, or a keeper of an eating house, from Middle English cok, coke, cook, couk, cuk(e) (Old English cōc) ‘cook’ or ‘seller of cooked foods’. See also Kew .
Irish and Scottish: usually identical in origin with the English name (see 1 above), but in some cases a shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cúg ‘son of Hugo’ (see McCook ).

Americanized form (translation into English) of various European surnames meaning ‘cook’, such as German and Jewish Koch , Dutch Kook , Polish Kucharz and Kucharczyk , Slovenian and Croatian Kuhar , North German Kuk .

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

en.lifeSummary: When Sarah Cooke was born on 20 November 1635, in Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, her father, John Cooke, was 28 and her mother, Sarah Warren, was 11632. She married Arthur Hathaway on 20 November 1652, in Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 26 February 1712, in Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 76, and was buried in Acushnet, Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sarah Cooke est née le 20 novembre 1635, à Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, John Cooke, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Sarah Warren, avait 11632 ans. Elle a épousé Arthur Hathaway le 20 novembre 1652, à Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 26 février 1712, à Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterrée à Acushnet, Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sarah Cooke am 20. November 1635 in Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Cooke 28 und ihre Mutter Sarah Warren 11632. Sie hat am 20. November 1652 in Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Arthur Hathaway geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 26. Februar 1712 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Acushnet, Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Cooke è nata il il 20 novembre 1635 nel Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, John Cooke, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Sarah Warren, aveva 11632 anni. Lei sposato Arthur Hathaway il 20 novembre 1652, nel Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 26 febbraio 1712, nel Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolta a Acushnet, Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Sarah Cookeが1635年11月20日にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーで生まれた時，父John Cookeは28歳，母Sarah Warrenは11632歳であった。1652年11月20日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニープリモウスダクスブリーでArthur Hathawayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1712年2月26日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーブリストルダルトモウスで76歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーブリストルダルトモウスアクウシュネットにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sarah Cooke(이)가 1635년 11월 20일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Cooke(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sarah Warren(은)는 11632세였다. 그녀는 1652년 11월 20일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 플림우스 드스버이에서 Arthur Hathaway(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1712년 2월 26일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 브리스톨 더르트모우스에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 브리스톨 더르트모우스 악슈넷에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Cooke nasceu em 20 de novembro de 1635, em Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, John Cooke, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Warren, tinha 11632 anos. Ela casou-se com Arthur Hathaway em 20 de novembro de 1652, em Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 26 de fevereiro de 1712, em Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 76 anos, e foi sepultada em Acushnet, Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sarah Cooke родилась 20 ноября 1635 г. в местности плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени John Cooke было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah Warren, 11632. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Arthur Hathaway 20 ноября 1652 г. в местности дуксбури, плимоут, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 26 февраля 1712 г. в местности дартмоут, бристол, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 76 лет и была похоронена в местности акушнет, дартмоут, бристол, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sarah Cooke nació el 20 de noviembre de 1635, en Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, John Cooke, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Sarah Warren, tenía 11632 años. Se casó con Arthur Hathaway el 20 de noviembre de 1652, en Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 26 de febrero de 1712, en Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultada en Acushnet, Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
